business_description.nature_of_business: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas

coverages_discussed.notes: 11 claims reported in the 2024 policy period.

positives: Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors
Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring
concerns: Building not fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R
OSHA citations in the past 3 years
No cyber liability protections in place
Plumbing and electrical systems are original (2005)
Prior policy cancellation in 2022 with Zurich Insurance Group
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Total of 20 claims over the past 3 years (11 in 2024, 3 in 2023, 6 in 2022).

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program in place. Material Safety Data Sheets (MSDS) maintained. However, no quality control / quality assurance program is implemented, and there have been OSHA citations in the past 3 years.
